suppress.notes: file name: netty-tcnative-classes-2.0.46.Final.jar - appears to be false positive

file name: json-20201115.jar CVE-2022-45688 in org.json/json - misleading CPE The cpe on the NIST site: cpe:2.3:a:hutool:hutool:5.8.10:*:*:*:*:*:*:* does not seem related to org.json/json https://github.com/jeremylong/DependencyCheck/issues/5401 users can already have some control by setting the -Xss JVM option

file name: nimbus-jose-jwt-9.22.jar (shaded: net.minidev:json-smart:2.4.8) This is a false positive as we have net.minidev:json-smart:2.4.10 as a dependency and we don't have ini-parser as a dependency.
file name: azure-identity-1.10.3.jar This is a false positive as version from 1.10.2 are fixed.
file name: azure-core-1.45.1.jar, azure-core-http-netty-1.13.11.jar, azure-identity-1.11.1.jar, azure-json-1.1.0.jar This is a false positive. The CVE is for azure-cli

com.azure:azure-core, azure-core-http-netty, azure-identity, and azure-json are already at the latest stable releases used in this repo. There is no newer in-line Maven Central upgrade available for CVE-2026-33117 at the moment.
com.azure:azure-identity:1.18.3 is already the latest stable release published to Maven Central. There is no newer stable in-line upgrade available for CVE-2024-35255 at the moment.
com.microsoft.azure:msal4j:1.24.1 is the latest stable release published to Maven Central. There is no newer stable in-line upgrade available for this MSAL finding at the moment.
The remaining Kotlin stdlib jdk7/jdk8 findings are transitive and persist even with current Azure dependency versions.

file name: spring-boot-loader-2.7.18.jar We are pinned to Spring Boot 2.7.x on Java 17. There is no newer 2.7.x release in Maven Central, so these CVEs cannot be remediated by an in-line version bump at the moment.
Jetty 10.0.26 is the newest Jetty 10 release available in Maven Central. Remediation for this CVE requires moving off the Jetty 10 line, which is outside the current Java 17 / Jetty 10 constraints.
